abilities.name: Diving Charge
abilities.description: May declare Charge while engaged. Ignores intervening characters, terrain, opponents cannot Disengage.

abilities.name: Hard to Wound +1
abilities.description: Damage flips against this character suffer -.

actions: (1) Wulfen Claws (Pugilism) | AV: 6 (13) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/4/6 damage. Ram Crushing Strike: Damage flip gains + per Ram.
(2) The Mauling (Pugilism) | AV: 6 (13) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage and Critical Hit of appropriate severity. Crow Eat Anything: After damaging Living/Undead, heal 1 damage.
(0) Howl to the Blood Moon (Intimidate) | Discard card. Every Living within p10 makes TN 13 Centering Challenge. Failed gain Prey Condition until next turn (no Charge, Walk only in melee).
system.notes: Massive undead wolves. Servants of Titania, Autumn Queen of Fae. Keenly intelligent and cunning assassins. Roam Knotwoods hunting Neverborn and human. Dangerous regardless of moon phase.
